title: Nostalgia Beetkveik
description: A fermented and juicy Norwegian dish featuring cooked beetroot, ideal for those seeking a plant-based-friendly meal.

ingredients.name: Water
ingredients.amount: Enough to cover beetroot during fermentation

instructions: Wash and peel the beetroot. Cut into chunks.
Place the beetchunks in a baking dish, drizzle with olive oil, salt, and pepper. Roast until tender (about 45 minutes).
After roasting, remove from heat and allow to cool slightly.
Transfer roasted beetchunks to a fermentation container or jar, add enough water to cover fully. Mix well.
Cover the container with a breathable lid (e.g., cheesecloth), ensuring some air circulation but preventing dust. Place in a warm, draft-free location for 3-5 days.
Once fermented, mix in optional ingredients like lemon juice or apple cider vinegar for flavor and health benefits, if desired. Store in fridge to slow the fermentation process.
